title: BETHANIE'S ROOM - 211info
text: BETHANIE'S ROOM BETHANIE'S ROOM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a low-barrier, overnight shelter. Guests will have access to peer support specialists and the ability to store belongings at the site during the day. 1015 NW 17th Avenue Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as female, transgender, or non-binary. Pets allowed. Hours: Intake: 7 days per week 7pm-8pm. Returning guests are guaranteed their bed provided they arrive by 8pm. Shelter: 7 days per week 8pm-8am Email (971) 358-7744 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 358-7744 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Do not begin line-up prior to intake hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: City of Portland TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On the corner of NW 17th Avenue and NW Lovejoy Street Services: Community Shelters * Homeless Women Community Shelters * LGBTQ2+ Individuals If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BETHANIE'S ROOM
